_comment: Routes audited by `node plugins/soleur/docs/scripts/screenshot-gate.mjs` to detect critical-CSS FOUC. Source: every template that renders `.page-hero` or `.landing-hero` above the fold (enumerate via `rg -l 'page-hero|landing-hero' plugins/soleur/docs/pages plugins/soleur/docs/_includes`). Per AGENTS.md `cq-eleventy-critical-css-screenshot-gate`, any new above-fold template must be added here.
